PowerShell(Get-ChildItem D:\\Staging\\NETA\\neta-ai\\data -Recurse -File | Select-Object @{N='Path';E={$_.FullName.Replace\('D:\\Staging\\NETA\\neta-ai\\',''\)}}, @{N='SizeKB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}}, LastWriteTime | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("D:\\NETA.AI\\data\\seed\\003_booths.sql"\); Write-Host "Size: $\($bytes.Length\)"; Write-Host "BOM hex: $\($bytes[0].ToString\('X2'\)\)$\($bytes[1].ToString\('X2'\)\)$\($bytes[2].ToString\('X2'\)\)$\($bytes[3].ToString\('X2'\)\)"; $content = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $lines = $content -split "`n"; Write-Host "Lines: $\($lines.Count\)"; Write-Host "Line 1: $\($lines[0].Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(80, $lines[0].Length\)\)\)")

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING = "utf-8"; $output = & python "D:\\NETA.AI\\scripts\\generate_booth_seed.py" 2>&1; $outputStr = $output -join "`n"; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\("D:\\NETA.AI\\data\\seed\\003_booths.sql", $outputStr, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8NoBOM\); $size = \(Get-Item "D:\\NETA.AI\\data\\seed\\003_booths.sql"\).Length; Write-Host "Written $size bytes"; $lines = $outputStr.Split\("`n"\).Count; Write-Host "Lines: $lines"; Write-Host "First: $\($outputStr.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(80,$outputStr.Length\)\)\)")

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING = "utf-8"; $output = & python "D:\\NETA.AI\\scripts\\generate_booth_seed.py"; $outputStr = $output -join "`n"; $utf8NoBOM = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\("D:\\NETA.AI\\data\\seed\\003_booths.sql", $outputStr, $utf8NoBOM\); $size = \(Get-Item "D:\\NETA.AI\\data\\seed\\003_booths.sql"\).Length; $lines = $outputStr.Split\("`n"\).Count; Write-Host "Written: $size bytes, $lines lines"; Write-Host "BOM: $\(\(Get-Content 'D:\\NETA.AI\\data\\seed\\003_booths.sql' -Encoding Byte -TotalCount 4 | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\('X2'\) }\) -join ' '\)")
